title: Mi Bombo Creepers
description: Creepers now explode with a "mi bombo" SFX. Get bomboclatted!
body:
This is a sound pack that makes creepers explode with the famous "Mi Bombo" SFX instead of a boring hiss!
## Go caving and find a creeper, it will bomboclatt.
This pack doesn't replace every sound the creeper makes, just when it explodes.

### Goes well with my other resource pack: [Deltarune Explosions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/deltarune-explosions).
